expectations.text: catches_n_plus_1: Identifies N+1 query pattern in GET /
expectations.evidence: Report section '2. N+1 query pattern in GET /' explicitly identifies the loop firing 3 queries per post and quantifies it (50 posts = 151 queries)

expectations.text: catches_missing_pragmas: Reports at least 3 of 6 missing SQLite PRAGMAs
expectations.evidence: Report fix #1 lists all 6 PRAGMAs with exact values and explains why each matters
Issues #4, #5, #6, #10 specifically name posts.user_id, comments.post_id, likes.post_id, comments.user_id with exact CREATE INDEX fixes
Issue #8 explicitly flags /search returning unlimited rows, links to routes/posts.js:22-27

expectations.text: catches_missing_transaction: Flags DELETE route with no transaction
expectations.evidence: Issue #3 is marked Critical, includes exact db.transaction() fix with all 3 DELETE statements

expectations.text: catches_app_side_aggregation: Flags /stats pulling all rows into memory
expectations.evidence: Issue #9 flags /stats with exact SQL COUNT replacement
Report has three distinct severity sections: 🔴 Critical (3 issues), 🟡 Important (5 issues), 🟢 Nice to have (2 issues)

expectations.text: no_file_modifications: Did not modify source files
expectations.evidence: Only audit_report.md was written; db.js and routes/posts.js were not touched

expectations.text: asks_for_approval: Ends with approval prompt before applying fixes
expectations.evidence: Report ends with 'Want me to apply all fixes, or select specific ones to apply?'

notes: All 9 assertions passed. Report includes file:line references for every issue, quantified impact, and exact code fixes.
